creator: mohacsi@niif.hu
text:
Sorry! I was not clear.

Can you modify the ports to offer threads off in case of FreeBSD 6.x?

or alternatively

Would it possible to modify the port to disable threading by default in 
case of FreeBSD 6.x?

Thank you for the consideration.

Janos Mohacsi
